body_transformation: The rounded head now bears a polished steel mushroom cap with subtle engraved geometric patterns, its textured surface replaced by smooth reflective metal. Pink body color shifts to gunmetal gray with deep indigo accents along the edges, while white spots transform into chrome silver dots embedded in the metal. Short stubby legs gain reinforced armor plates with mechanical joints showing faint blue energy lines. The curled tail tip becomes a rigid steel extension with sharp angular edges and a smooth reflective finish.
signature_feature: Mushroom cap: polished steel with engraved geometric patterns and glowing blue energy lines.
